common.identityHidden: Your identity stays hidden until a mutual match.

phoneLogin.sendCodeDescription: We'll send you a verification code via SMS.

birthday.title: Your Birthday
birthday.description:
You must be at least 18 to use Wave.
This cannot be changed later.
birthday.ageWarning: You must be at least 18 years old to use Wave.
birthday.saveError: We had trouble saving your birthday. Check your connection and try again.

gender.title: About You
gender.description: This helps us show you the right people nearby.
gender.permanenceWarning:
Your gender cannot be changed later.
Discovery preferences can be updated in settings.
gender.saveError: We had trouble saving your profile. Check your connection and try again.

onboarding.title: Add your socials
onboarding.description: Add at least one so your matches can connect with you.
onboarding.socialsHidden: Your socials are only revealed after a mutual match.
onboarding.requireDescription: Please add at least one username so your matches can reach you.
onboarding.instagramTaken: This Instagram username is already linked to another Wave account.
onboarding.instagramInvalid: Please enter a valid Instagram username (letters, numbers, dots, and underscores).
onboarding.snapchatTaken: This Snapchat username is already linked to another Wave account.
onboarding.snapchatInvalid: Please enter a valid Snapchat username (3-15 characters, starts with a letter).

note.title: Add a Note
note.description: Help people nearby recognize you. Something like your name, what you're wearing, or where you are.
note.placeholder: e.g. "Alex, red hoodie near the bar"
note.optional: This is optional. You can always add or change it in settings.
note.saveError: Your note couldn't be saved. You can try again in settings.

nearbyAlerts.title: Never Miss a Connection
nearbyAlerts.description: Get notified when Wave users are near you so you can wave before they leave.
nearbyAlerts.checkLocation: We check your location when you open Wave
nearbyAlerts.notifyNearby: You get a notification when Wave users are nearby
nearbyAlerts.locationPrivacy: Your location is never shared with other users
nearbyAlerts.toggleSubtitle: Know when Wave users are around you
nearbyAlerts.canChange: You can change this anytime in Settings.
nearbyAlerts.saveError: We had trouble saving your preference. Check your connection and try again.
nearbyAlerts.locationDenied: You've previously denied location access. To enable nearby alerts, open Settings and allow location for Wave.

ageBlocked.title: Age Restricted
ageBlocked.description:
You must be at least 18 years old to use Wave.
Come back when you're old enough!
ageBlocked.signOutErrorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

splash.connectionError: Could not connect. Check your internet and try again.

radar.title: Wave
radar.noInternetDescription: You can see nearby people, but waves need internet to send.
radar.waveBackHint: Wave back to match and see their Instagram
radar.addNote: Add a note — help people find you
radar.proximityHint: Wave users were detected in your area. Keep scanning — they may appear as you move around.
radar.scanningDescription: Wave at someone nearby. If they wave back, you'll match and see each other's Instagram!
radar.discoverDescription: Tap <bold>Start Discovery</bold> to find people around you. Wave at someone — if they wave back, you'll match and see each other's Instagram.
radar.shareMessage: I'm using Wave to connect with people nearby! Download it and wave at me 👋
radar.waveSentToast: Wave sent! You can undo anytime before it expires.
radar.alreadyMatchedToast: You've already matched with this person!
radar.waveTooFast: You're waving too fast. Wait a moment.
radar.couldntWave: Could not send wave. Try again.
radar.couldntUndo: Could not undo wave. It may have been matched or expired.
radar.permissionsBody: Wave needs Bluetooth permissions to discover nearby people.
radar.connectionIssueBody: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet and try again.

match.title: It's a Match!
match.subtitle: You both waved at each other

history.title: Matches
history.emptyDescription: When you and someone nearby both wave at each other, you'll match and they'll appear here.
history.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}}? This removes the match for both of you.
history.removeError: Could not remove the match. Try again.
history.shareMessage: I'm using Wave to connect with people nearby! Download it and wave at me 👋

settings.title: Settings
settings.genderLocked: Gender and date of birth are set during signup and cannot be changed.
settings.discoveryHint: Only people matching your preferences will appear on your radar.
settings.nearbyAlertsSubtitle: Get notified when Wave users are near you
settings.nearbyAlertsHint: Uses your location when you open Wave. Your location is never shared with other users.
settings.eveningRemindersSubtitle: Get a daily nudge during peak hours (6–8 PM)
settings.eveningRemindersHint: One notification per day when Wave users are most active near you.
settings.socialsHint: Your socials are shown to your match after a mutual wave.
settings.noteHint: Visible to everyone nearby. Changes appear within about 30 seconds.
settings.reportDescription: To report someone, long-press their match in your match history and choose "Report User". You can also email us directly.
settings.blockDescription: To remove someone, long-press their match in your match history and choose "Remove Match". This removes them from your history. Full blocking will be available in a future update.
settings.signOutConfirm: You'll need to sign in again to use Wave.
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account, all matches, and your data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteHint: Permanently removes your account, matches, and all data.
settings.instagramInvalid: Invalid username. Use letters, numbers, dots, and underscores.
settings.snapchatTaken: This Snapchat username is already taken.
settings.snapchatInvalid: Invalid Snapchat username. 3-15 characters, starts with a letter.
settings.preferenceError: Could not update preference. Try again.
settings.ageRangeError: Could not update age range. Try again.
settings.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. To enable nearby alerts, open Settings and allow location for Wave.
settings.locationRequired: Location permission is required for nearby alerts.
settings.alertsError: Could not update alerts. Try again.
settings.noteError: Could not update note. Try again.
settings.notSignedIn: Not signed in. Please restart the app.
settings.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
settings.deleteError: Failed to delete account. Try again.

permissions.title: Discover Nearby
permissions.description: Wave uses Bluetooth to find people around you. Your identity stays anonymous until you both wave at each other.
permissions.bullet1: Bluetooth scans for nearby Wave users
permissions.bullet3: Your identity is hidden until mutual match
permissions.requiredBody: Wave needs Bluetooth permissions to discover nearby people. Please enable them in Settings.
permissions.locationBody: Wave needs location permission to discover nearby Bluetooth devices.

bleStatus.bluetoothOff: Bluetooth is turned off. Please enable it in Settings.
bleStatus.unauthorized: Bluetooth permission denied. Open Settings to allow access.
bleStatus.unsupported: This device does not support Bluetooth Low Energy.

auth.appleNotAvailable: Apple Sign In is not available on this device
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.codeExpired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
auth.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.

icebreakers.1: What made you wave at me?
icebreakers.2: We were close enough to wave — where were you?
icebreakers.3: How long were you on the radar before you waved?
icebreakers.4: Do you wave at everyone, or am I special? 😏
icebreakers.5: I waved, you waved back — now what?
icebreakers.6: What’s your Wave success rate so far?
icebreakers.8: What’s the best thing about this place?
icebreakers.9: Are you here with friends or flying solo?
icebreakers.10: How’s your night going so far?
icebreakers.14: What’s the best thing that happened to you this week?
icebreakers.15: If you could teleport anywhere right now, where would you go?
icebreakers.18: What’s something you’re weirdly good at?
icebreakers.19: Last song you had on repeat?
icebreakers.21: Dogs or cats — and this matters
icebreakers.22: If we grabbed food right now, where are we going?
icebreakers.23: So what’s the story behind your username?
icebreakers.24: Tell me something your Instagram doesn’t show
icebreakers.25: What’s your best quality that I can’t see from your profile?
icebreakers.26: On a scale of 1-10, how brave was my wave?
icebreakers.27: I’m going to guess three things about you — ready?
icebreakers.29: First impression of me based on... absolutely nothing 😂
